seo.title: TinaCMS Product Roadmap – Features & Updates
seo.description: Explore the TinaCMS product roadmap. See what features are shipping now, what's coming soon, and submit your ideas via GitHub Discussions.

blocks.title: {Roadmap}
blocks.subtext: Welcome to Tina's public roadmap! This is a live document, and will be updated regularly. To submit an idea, or to view a list of feature requests and ideas that we're considering, check out our GitHub Discussions.

items.heading: TinaCloud Separate Content Repo Support
items.content: Multi-repo support lets a single TinaCloud project connect a separate content repository alongside the generator/code repo - an Enterprise-friendly setup that decouples editors' content from the application code, eliminating schema-sync issues and duplicate TinaCMS lock files.

items.heading: React-Free Astro Support
items.content: TinaCMS live editing now works in Astro without pulling React into your site. Editors click any field to edit it inline in the admin while production ships zero editor code

items.heading: GitHub Enterprise Support
items.content: TinaCloud now supports connecting to GitHub enterprise on-premise installations.

items.heading: 2FA Authentication
items.content: Strengthens security for TinaCloud users by adding an extra layer of protection to prevent unauthorized access, ensuring safer content management.

items.heading: Vercel Data Cache Support
items.content: Hosting on Vercel? This enhances TinaCMS performance by leveraging Vercel’s data caching to speed up content delivery, reduce API load, and improve editing responsiveness.

items.heading: React 19 Support
items.content: Enhances TinaCMS with improved performance, more efficient rendering, and better compatibility with modern React features.

items.heading: Docs Starter Template
items.content: Since Tina works so well with documentation sites, we've built a best-of-breed TinaCMS + Docs starter template with Next.js.

items.heading: Build system - move from Commonjs to ESM
items.content: We’re modernizing our build system by switching from CommonJS to ESM for better performance and compatibility.

items.heading: Editorial Workflow Support for Media Manager
items.content: We're adding Editorial Workflow support to the Media Manager, enabling media changes to go through the same branch-based workflow as content edits.

items.heading: TinaCloud Performance
items.content: Improvements to our Content API - faster response times for content retrieval. This will improve static site build times for quicker deployments. For enterprise customers, we are adding data isolation, ensuring their data remains separate from other accounts for better security and scalability.

items.heading: Improving Media Management UX
items.content: There are several media management improvements that we have on our list (image search, support for more media types, etc).

items.heading: Content Changes with GitHub Actions
items.content: We're adding a public GitHub Action for querying and editing your content. One of the use cases for this would be using GitHub actions to periodically use AI to find content in your project, e.g. documentation.

items.heading: TinaCMS v4
items.content: We're reworking the foundation of TinaCMS so more parts can be customised or replaced without forking the project. This will make TinaCMS easier to maintain and give teams more control over how the editor works.

items.heading: TinaCMS - Telemetry (powered by PostHog)
items.content: We’re introducing optional telemetry powered by PostHog to better understand how users interact with TinaCMS. This data will help guide improvements to the platform while maintaining user privacy. Since TinaCMS is open source, all telemetry will be fully optional and configurable.

items.heading: TinaCloud - CLI
items.content: A first-party TinaCloud CLI lets developers manage projects, repos, branches, and more from the terminal.

items.heading: TinaCMS v4.1 - MDX plugin adaptors
items.content: We’re adding MDX plugin adapters so teams can use their preferred Markdown tools and Markdown flavors while keeping TinaCMS Visual Editing. Fumadocs is planned as the first supported adapter.

items.heading: Improved PR workflow
items.content: We are making some improvements to Tina's Editorial Workflow that will allow you to merge Pull Requests from within the CMS UI.

items.heading: Copilot Instructions
items.content: We're working on providing documentation for VibeCoding with TinaCMS to make it even easier to use.

items.heading: TinaCloud - Project Insights
items.content: We’re adding new analytics to the TinaCloud portal to help teams understand how their content is evolving. These insights show who is making changes, which files are being updated, and how activity trends over time — giving teams clearer visibility into their content workflows.

items.heading: MCP Server
items.content: We're working on some ways to leverage AI in the content creation process.

actions.label: Do you use /llms.txt to make your site LLM-friendly? 🔗

items.heading: Swapping auth from AWS Cognito to WorkOS
items.content: We’re updating our authentication to use WorkOS, making it simpler and more reliable to manage user access.
